content: i forgot to reply! you probably know by now, but it's basically matchup dependent... most bosses only really require 1, but arc 1 bosses have a lot of cocoon for the later ones, so yeah it's a lot more difficult

embeds.title: [Morimens] Nostalgic Uvhash vs. (H2-9) Blesser Boss Guide
embeds.description: Going through some older gameplay again and "explaining" the attack pattern of Hard Blesser and how to defeat them with Uvhash (though this same "strategy" can also mostly be applied to Helot-Catena - well, it's easier with her actually - or Helot and Doresain as well). Thanks for listening or watch

content: also here's a pseudo-guide video for anyone checking the thread
Thank you. I ended up using Salv instead for the later stages of chapter 9 A lot of the boss mechs punish Uvhash like card cost increase and Aliemus cost lol. It's so difficult
